'''Sheris''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Belsmuth sector/Legends|Belsmuth sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
During the [[Thrawn campaign]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Sheris|defended]] the [[Bhir'khi Pass]] from [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] forces in order to keep them from reaching [[Marter An]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].

==Appearances==
